summary: Azure Container Apps is a serverless container platform...

sources.title: Azure Container Apps overview
sources.content: Azure Container Apps enables you to run microservices and containerized applications on a serverless platform.

sources.title: Quickstart: Deploy your first container app
sources.content: In this quickstart, you create and deploy your first container app using the Azure portal.

sources.title: What's new in Azure Container Apps
sources.content: Announcing new features including GPU workload profiles and serverless GPU support.

sources.title: Running AI workloads on ACA
sources.content: Learn how to deploy LLM inference on Azure Container Apps with GPU support.

sources.title: azure-samples/container-apps-ai
sources.description: Sample code for running AI workloads on Azure Container Apps
